name: add_candidate_note
description: Add a note to a candidate's opportunity record. Notes are visible to all team members on the hiring panel and are commonly used for interview feedback, recruiter observations, or general comments.

parameters.name: opportunity_id
parameters.description: The ID of the opportunity to add the note to.

parameters.name: value
parameters.example: Strong technical skills. Recommend advancing to on-site.

parameters.name: secret
parameters.description: If true, the note is only visible to super admins.

body.value: Strong technical skills. Recommend advancing to on-site.

data.value: Strong technical skills. Recommend advancing to on-site.
